mapper.select: select mb.title, mb.content, mb.created_at, mb.view_cnt,mb.reply_cnt,qb.category,qb.board_id from master_board mb join qna_board qb on mb.board_id = qb.board_id where username=#{username} and deleted=0 ORDER BY mb.created_at DESC
select mb.title,qb.board_id,mb.view_cnt from master_board mb join qna_board qb on mb.board_id = qb.board_id where qb.category="꿀팁" and deleted=0 ORDER BY mb.view_cnt DESC

select mb.title,mb.view_cnt,mb.content,mb.view_cnt,mb.reply_cnt,qb.board_id from master_board mb join qna_board qb on mb.board_id = qb.board_id where qb.category="질문" and deleted=0 ORDER BY mb.created_at DESC
